localEmployers.name: MVP Staffing
localEmployers.convictionPolicy: Works with individuals with criminal backgrounds. Felon-friendly.
localEmployers.notes: Specializes in manufacturing and warehouse. Detroit has many automotive parts plants.

localEmployers.name: S&K Staffing
localEmployers.convictionPolicy: Michigan-based agency. Works with returning citizens.
localEmployers.notes: Local agency — more personal than national chains.

localEmployers.name: Onin Group
localEmployers.convictionPolicy: Focuses on industrial jobs for individuals with criminal backgrounds.
localEmployers.notes: One of the most felon-friendly staffing agencies. Fast placement.

localEmployers.name: Hired In Michigan Career Institute
localEmployers.payRange: Free service — places you with employers
localEmployers.convictionPolicy: Specifically connects returning citizens with hiring companies.
localEmployers.notes: Offers short-term career training. Specializes in placing people with records.

localEmployers.name: SER Metro-Detroit (Jobs for Progress)
localEmployers.convictionPolicy: Second chance employer network member. Serves returning citizens.
localEmployers.notes: Nonprofit workforce development. Training + placement + support services.

localEmployers.name: Michigan Department of Corrections — Vocational Village
localEmployers.phone: Contact through Pure Michigan Talent Connect
localEmployers.notes: Free skilled trades training while incarcerated or post-release. CDL and welding are highest demand.

localEmployers.name: Fiat Chrysler (Stellantis) — Suppliers
localEmployers.address: Detroit metro area — Sterling Heights, Warren, Auburn Hills
localEmployers.phone: Apply through staffing agencies (MVP, Onin, Kelly Services)
localEmployers.applyUrl: Most auto supplier positions filled through staffing agencies
localEmployers.convictionPolicy: Tier 1-3 auto suppliers vary. Many accept felons through temp agencies.
localEmployers.notes: The auto industry is Detroit's biggest employer. Going through a staffing agency bypasses direct background check from the OEM.

localEmployers.name: Amazon — DTW Warehouses
localEmployers.address: Romulus, Livonia, Pontiac, and other Detroit metro locations
localEmployers.convictionPolicy: Case-by-case. Ban the Box. Very felon-friendly.
localEmployers.notes: Multiple warehouses near Detroit. Night shifts often available immediately.

localEmployers.name: City of Detroit — Returning Citizens Liaison
localEmployers.address: Coleman A. Young Municipal Center, Detroit, MI 48226
localEmployers.convictionPolicy: City of Detroit has a Returning Citizens Task Force. Fair chance employer.
localEmployers.notes: The city itself hires returning citizens AND connects you with their network of employers, housing, and legal aid.
